$schema_note: AI image generation brief for the NetLogo MCP project. Feed each asset's 'prompt' to the image generator. Always prepend the 'global.style_directive' and append the 'global.negative_prompt' unless an asset overrides them.

project.name: NetLogo MCP
project.tagline: Talk to NetLogo. AI runs the simulation.
project.description: The first MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for NetLogo. Lets AI assistants (Claude, Cursor, etc.) create, run, and analyze agent-based simulations through natural conversation.
project.brand_concept: The Conversational Flock — NetLogo's identity is the triangular 'turtle' agent and emergence (many simple agents forming complex patterns). MCP's identity is AI conversation. The brand fuses them: speech bubbles and chat elements built out of small flocking triangle agents. Conversation that commands a swarm.

background_dark.name: Deep Space Slate
background_dark.usage: primary background on all dark assets

background_dark_alt.name: Slate Raised
background_dark_alt.usage: cards, panels, subtle elevation on dark background

primary.name: Emergence Emerald
primary.usage: the agents/turtles, simulation, life, primary brand color

primary_bright.name: Emerald Glow
primary_bright.usage: highlights, glows, lead agents, hover states

secondary.name: Protocol Violet
secondary.usage: AI / MCP / conversation elements, speech bubbles, the 'AI side' of any composition

text_light.name: Paper White
text_light.usage: all headline text on dark backgrounds

text_muted.name: Slate Mist
text_muted.usage: secondary text, captions, grid lines, patch grid dots

accent_warm.name: Signal Amber
accent_warm.usage: VERY sparingly — one wolf among sheep, a single highlighted agent, max 5% of any composition

global.style_directive: Modern flat vector illustration style for a developer tool brand. Clean geometric shapes, generous negative space, dark deep-navy-slate (#0B1220) background. Small triangular arrowhead shapes ('agents', like paper planes or NetLogo turtles) in emerald green (#10B981) are the recurring motif — they appear in flocks with subtle motion trails. Violet (#8B5CF6) represents the AI/conversation side. Subtle soft glow on key elements, faint dotted grid texture in the background suggesting NetLogo's patch grid. No gradients except very subtle radial glows. Crisp edges, 2D, no 3D render, no skeuomorphism, no photorealism.
global.negative_prompt: no photorealism, no 3D render, no humans, no realistic animals, no stock-photo look, no clutter, no rainbow colors, no neon cyberpunk overload, no gradients on text, no watermark, no signature, no blurry edges, no drop shadows on text, no extra text or gibberish lettering beyond the exact strings specified, no misspelled words
global.text_rendering_warning: AI image generators frequently mangle text. Every asset lists 'text_content' with EXACT strings. If the generator produces broken text, regenerate, or generate the art WITHOUT text and add text manually in an editor afterwards (preferred for anything with more than 3 words).
global.scaling_note: Generate at the listed pixel size or larger and downscale — never upscale. For assets marked retina:true, generate at 2x the listed size.

assets.name: Primary Logo Mark (icon only)
assets.purpose: The core brand mark. Used as repo avatar, favicon source, PyPI icon, and the symbol in all other assets.
assets.format: PNG with transparent background (also request an SVG/vector recreation later — this PNG is the visual reference)
assets.concept: A rounded speech bubble OUTLINE whose shape is suggested in violet, containing three triangular arrowhead agents in emerald flying in a V-formation (one lead agent, two followers), like birds flocking inside a conversation. Meaning: 'conversation commands the swarm'. Must read clearly at 32x32 px.
assets.prompt: Minimalist flat vector logo mark on a transparent background. A single rounded speech-bubble outline drawn in violet #8B5CF6, stroke width about 1/18 of the canvas, with the classic small tail at the bottom-left. Inside the bubble, three solid triangular arrowhead shapes (like minimalist paper planes or map cursors) in emerald green #10B981, arranged in a flying V-formation pointing toward the upper right: one larger lead triangle front-right, two smaller follower triangles behind-left, slightly rotated as if banking in flight. The lead triangle is slightly brighter (#34D399). Perfectly centered composition, generous padding (mark occupies ~70% of canvas), pixel-crisp edges, completely flat, no gradients, no glow, no text, no background.
assets.negative_prompt_extra: no letters, no words, no background color, no circle enclosure, no gradient fills
acceptance_criteria: Only two colors used: #8B5CF6 outline, #10B981/#34D399 fills

assets.name: Horizontal Logo Lockup (mark + wordmark)
assets.purpose: Top of README, docs site header.
assets.concept: The logo mark on the left, wordmark 'NetLogo MCP' on the right. 'NetLogo' in Paper White, 'MCP' in Protocol Violet.
assets.prompt: Horizontal logo lockup on transparent background. Left side: the NetLogo MCP logo mark — a violet #8B5CF6 rounded speech-bubble outline containing three emerald #10B981 triangular arrowhead agents in V-formation pointing upper-right. Right side: the wordmark text 'NetLogo MCP' in a bold modern geometric sans-serif font (similar to Inter or Manrope, weight 700): the word 'NetLogo' in off-white #F8FAFC and the word 'MCP' in violet #8B5CF6, single line, vertically centered with the mark, comfortable spacing between mark and text. Flat vector style, no effects, no background.
assets.fallback: If text renders broken: generate mark only and typeset 'NetLogo MCP' manually (font: Inter Bold or Manrope Bold).
acceptance_criteria: Text reads exactly 'NetLogo MCP' with correct spelling and casing

assets.name: GitHub Social Preview Card
assets.purpose: Shown when the repo link is shared on X, LinkedIn, Discord, Slack. Upload via GitHub repo Settings > Social preview.
assets.safe_area_note: Keep all text and the logo inside the central 1120x560 area — platforms crop edges.
assets.concept: Split metaphor: violet conversation energy on the left flows into an emerald flock of agents spreading to the right — chat becomes simulation.
assets.prompt: Wide promotional banner, flat vector illustration, deep navy-slate background #0B1220 with a very faint dotted grid pattern (#94A3B8 at 8% opacity, dots spaced evenly like a simulation patch grid). LEFT THIRD: a glowing violet #8B5CF6 rounded speech-bubble outline with a soft subtle violet radial glow behind it. FROM the bubble, a stream of small emerald #10B981 triangular arrowhead agents emerges and fans out across the center and right two-thirds of the image like a murmuration of birds — about 25-40 triangles of varying small sizes, flowing in an elegant S-curve, each leaving a very subtle short motion trail, a few highlighted in brighter #34D399. One single amber #F59E0B triangle among them near the center as a focal accent. CENTER, overlaid on the composition: the headline text 'NetLogo MCP' in bold geometric sans-serif #F8FAFC, large; below it the smaller subtitle 'Talk to NetLogo. AI runs the simulation.' in #94A3B8. Bottom-center, small text 'github.com/Razee4315/NetLogo-MCP' in #94A3B8. Spacious, balanced, premium developer-tool aesthetic.
text_content: Talk to NetLogo. AI runs the simulation.
assets.fallback: If any text is mangled, generate with NO text (pure flock illustration) and overlay all three strings manually: headline Inter Bold 88px #F8FAFC, subtitle Inter Medium 40px #94A3B8, URL Inter Regular 28px #94A3B8.
acceptance_criteria: All three text strings spelled exactly right
Flock flows left-to-right from the speech bubble

assets.name: README Hero Banner
assets.purpose: Wide banner at the top of README.md, replacing the plain logo.
assets.concept: Quieter sibling of the social card — logo lockup centered, gentle flock of agents sweeping behind it as ambient art, no tagline clutter.
assets.prompt: Very wide, short banner, flat vector style, deep navy-slate #0B1220 background with faint dotted patch-grid texture (#94A3B8 at 6% opacity). Centered: the NetLogo MCP horizontal lockup — violet #8B5CF6 speech-bubble outline mark with three emerald #10B981 triangular agents in V-formation, next to bold text 'NetLogo MCP' ('NetLogo' in #F8FAFC, 'MCP' in #8B5CF6). BEHIND and AROUND the lockup, sweeping from bottom-left to top-right across the full width: a sparse, elegant trail of 15-20 small emerald triangular agents at 30-60% opacity with subtle motion trails, denser at the edges and fading near the center so the lockup stays perfectly legible. Calm, premium, minimal.
assets.fallback: Generate without text, overlay lockup manually.
acceptance_criteria: Lockup fully legible against the background art
Edge agents do not touch the canvas border awkwardly

assets.name: v1.0.0 Launch Card — X/Twitter
assets.purpose: Image attached to the v1.0.0 release announcement post on X.
assets.concept: Celebration energy: the flock bursts outward from the version number like fireworks made of agents.
assets.prompt: Launch announcement card, flat vector style, deep navy-slate #0B1220 background with faint dotted grid. CENTER: huge bold text 'v1.0' in #F8FAFC with a subtle emerald glow, and directly below it 'NetLogo MCP' in medium-size bold text ('NetLogo' #F8FAFC, 'MCP' #8B5CF6). Radiating outward from behind the version number in all directions: a celebratory burst of 40-60 small emerald #10B981 triangular arrowhead agents flying away from the center like a firework or expanding flock, with motion trails pointing back toward the center, agents getting smaller and more transparent toward the canvas edges, a few in bright #34D399 and exactly two in amber #F59E0B. Below the wordmark, small subtitle 'The first MCP server for NetLogo' in #94A3B8. Energetic but clean, lots of dark negative space at the corners.
text_content: The first MCP server for NetLogo
assets.fallback: Generate the burst art only, overlay text manually.

assets.name: v1.0.0 Launch Card — LinkedIn
assets.purpose: LinkedIn post image for the release announcement.
assets.concept: Same as launch-x-card but recomposed for the flatter aspect ratio: burst shifted left, text block right-aligned.
assets.prompt: Launch announcement card, flat vector style, deep navy-slate #0B1220 background with faint dotted grid. LEFT 40%: a burst of 30-40 emerald #10B981 triangular arrowhead agents radiating outward from a violet #8B5CF6 speech-bubble outline, agents fading toward edges, one amber #F59E0B accent agent. RIGHT 55%: left-aligned text block — large bold 'v1.0' in #F8FAFC, below it 'NetLogo MCP' in bold ('NetLogo' #F8FAFC, 'MCP' #8B5CF6), below that 'The first MCP server for NetLogo' in #94A3B8, below that smaller 'github.com/Razee4315/NetLogo-MCP' in #94A3B8. Professional, spacious, premium developer-tool aesthetic.
text_content: The first MCP server for NetLogo
assets.fallback: Generate art-only left side, add text manually.

assets.name: Stylized Architecture Diagram
assets.purpose: Visual 'how it works' for README and docs. Replaces the ASCII flow: You -> AI Assistant -> MCP Protocol -> NetLogo MCP Server -> NetLogo.
assets.concept: Four nodes connected left-to-right by a stream of agents instead of plain arrows: Chat -> AI -> MCP Server -> NetLogo world.
assets.prompt: Horizontal flow diagram, flat vector style, deep navy-slate #0B1220 background with faint dotted grid. FOUR rounded-rectangle nodes (#111A2E fill, thin #94A3B8 outline at 30% opacity) evenly spaced left to right, connected by flowing streams of tiny emerald #10B981 triangular agents moving left-to-right with motion trails. NODE 1: a violet #8B5CF6 speech-bubble icon, labeled 'You' in #F8FAFC. NODE 2: a violet four-pointed AI sparkle icon, labeled 'AI Assistant'. NODE 3: the NetLogo MCP logo mark (violet bubble outline with three emerald triangles), labeled 'NetLogo MCP Server'. NODE 4: a miniature simulation world — a dark square panel containing a dotted patch grid with many small scattered emerald triangles and exactly two amber #F59E0B triangles among them, labeled 'NetLogo'. Each label sits below its node in clean sans-serif #F8FAFC. The agent-stream connectors gently undulate like a flock in transit. Clean, balanced, infographic-quality.
assets.fallback: Generate nodes and streams without labels, add the four labels manually.
acceptance_criteria: Connectors are agent streams, not plain arrows

assets.name: Mascot — 'Turt' the Conversational Turtle
assets.purpose: Docs, error pages, community, stickers. NetLogo's agents are literally called turtles.
assets.concept: A friendly geometric turtle whose shell is made of triangular agent shapes, holding/emitting a violet speech bubble. Flat, simple, 'GitHub Octocat energy' but geometric.
assets.prompt: Cute minimalist flat vector mascot on transparent background: a friendly cartoon turtle viewed from a three-quarter angle, body in deep slate #111A2E with simple rounded limbs and two large friendly white #F8FAFC oval eyes with dark pupils. Its shell is stylized as a tessellation of triangular plates in shades of emerald (#10B981 and #34D399), echoing flocking arrowhead agents. Next to its head floats a small violet #8B5CF6 speech-bubble outline containing three tiny emerald triangles in V-formation. Simple, geometric, charming, 2-3 flat colors plus white, thick clean outlines, no gradients, no 3D, no background, centered with padding.
acceptance_criteria: Speech bubble contains exactly 3 tiny triangles

assets.name: Sticker 1 — Murmuration Mark
assets.purpose: Die-cut sticker / community art: many tiny agents forming the speech-bubble silhouette.
assets.concept: Emergence as art: the brand's speech-bubble shape formed entirely by a swarm of tiny triangles — no outline at all.
assets.prompt: Flat vector sticker art on transparent background: the silhouette of a rounded speech bubble formed ENTIRELY by a dense swarm of roughly 80-120 tiny triangular arrowhead agents in emerald shades (#10B981, #34D399) and a sprinkle of violet #8B5CF6 ones (about 15%), denser at the silhouette edges and sparser inside, like a bird murmuration forming a shape against the sky. No outline stroke — the shape emerges purely from the swarm. A few agents stray just outside the silhouette for organic feel. One amber #F59E0B agent near the bubble's tail. Centered, padded, no text, no background.
acceptance_criteria: Speech-bubble shape clearly readable from the swarm alone

assets.name: Sticker 2 — Predator-Prey Yin-Yang
assets.purpose: Sticker referencing NetLogo's most famous model (Wolf Sheep Predation).
assets.concept: A yin-yang circle: one half a flock of emerald 'sheep' triangles, the other half amber 'wolf' triangles chasing them in the eternal cycle.
assets.prompt: Flat vector sticker on transparent background: a yin-yang style circular composition made of two interlocking swirls of small triangular arrowhead agents chasing each other clockwise in a circle. One swirl: many small emerald #10B981 triangles (the sheep). Other swirl: fewer, slightly larger amber #F59E0B triangles (the wolves) pursuing them. In the 'eye' dot of each half: a single agent of the opposite color. Background of the circle is deep slate #0B1220 with a faint dotted grid, circle has a thin #94A3B8 ring border. Dynamic rotational motion, motion trails on the agents, no text, centered, padded, transparent outside the circle.

assets.name: 3-Panel 'How It Works' Strip
assets.purpose: README / course slides: type a sentence -> AI thinks -> simulation comes alive.
assets.concept: Three equal panels separated by thin dividers, telling the story without words (captions added manually later).
assets.prompt: Three-panel horizontal storyboard, flat vector style, all panels on deep navy-slate #0B1220 with faint dotted grid, separated by thin vertical #94A3B8 lines at 20% opacity. PANEL 1 (left): a minimalist chat input bar (#111A2E rounded rectangle with #94A3B8 outline) with a violet #8B5CF6 text cursor and a violet speech bubble rising from it containing three small abstract text lines (just rounded line shapes, NOT real letters). PANEL 2 (center): a violet four-pointed AI sparkle icon with thin orbiting rings, surrounded by small emerald #10B981 triangles materializing out of violet dots, mid-transformation. PANEL 3 (right): a thriving simulation world — a dark rounded square panel filled with a dotted patch grid, dozens of emerald triangles flocking in swirls, two amber #F59E0B triangles among them, and a small rising line-chart in the corner of the panel drawn in #34D399. Visual energy increases left to right. No real text anywhere.
acceptance_criteria: No legible/gibberish text in the art

assets.name: Square Avatar / PyPI / Favicon Source
assets.purpose: GitHub profile-style square avatar, PyPI project icon, favicon source.
assets.concept: Logo mark on solid dark background with comfortable padding, slight emerald glow for pop at small sizes.
assets.prompt: Square app-icon style image: deep navy-slate #0B1220 background, very subtle radial glow of emerald at 10% opacity in the center, and centered on it the NetLogo MCP logo mark — violet #8B5CF6 rounded speech-bubble outline containing three emerald #10B981 triangular arrowhead agents in V-formation pointing upper-right, lead agent in #34D399. Mark occupies 65% of canvas, perfectly centered, flat vector, crisp, no text.
assets.post_processing: Export downscaled copies: 256, 128, 64, 32, 16 px for favicon.ico.

generation_tips.consistency: Generate logo-mark FIRST. For every later asset, attach logo-mark.png as a reference image if the generator supports image references — this keeps the mark geometry consistent across assets.
generation_tips.text_strategy: Anything with more than 3 words of text: strongly prefer generating art-only and adding text in a manual pass (font: Inter or Manrope, Bold for headlines). AI text rendering is the #1 failure mode.
generation_tips.color_fidelity: If the generator drifts from the hex values, regenerate mentioning the hex codes earlier in the prompt, or color-correct afterwards (the palette is intentionally simple: 1 dark, 1 green, 1 violet, 1 white, 1 amber).
generation_tips.upscaling: Generate large, downscale with bicubic. For the social preview and launch cards, 2x generation (e.g. 2560x1280) then downscale gives crisper edges.
